title: Priority Access for Senior Citizens
summary: Senior citizens are entitled to priority access in various public services.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Elderly citizens should receive priority in queues and services.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Helps reduce physical strain on seniors.

exampleScenario.situation: A government office refuses priority service to a senior citizen.
exampleScenario.explanation: Senior citizens are entitled to assistance.
